ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Discovery, Any Resolution, And/Or Setting Of An Evidentiary Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-18-2009 Continued To Apr-22-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Amended Petition For Order Directing Transfer Of Property To Trust
Off Calendar Feb-18-2009 Continued To Apr-22-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Sturges for and with Lance Ong. Monica Dell'Osso for and with Trustees Mark Ong and Tyi Ong.

Ms. Dell'Osso stated that the Vallejo property was back on the market and that the Polk street property was not part of the trust. Upon suggestion of the Court, the Parties agreed to participate in mediation with regard to the 850 petition. The Court signed the order referring the matter to mediation which is to be completed by April 10, 2009. The status conference was set for April 22, 2009. If the matter is not resolved, a trial date will be set at that time. Ms. Dell'Osso stated that she had addressed all of the issues raised in the Examiner's notes regarding the accounting and that the matter could be submitted. The Court directed Mr. Sturgis to file his objections to the accounting by February 20, 2009. Ms. Dell'Osso's reply is due by March 6, 2009. The accounting petition was continued to March 6, 2009 and will be taken under submission on that date.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1
Off Calendar Feb-18-2009 Continued To Mar-06-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Discovery, Any Resolution, And/Or Setting Of An Evidentiary Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-29-2008 Continued To Feb-18-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Dec-29-2008 Continued To Feb-18-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1
Off Calendar Nov-24-2008 Continued To Dec-29-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Order For Partial Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-10-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Sturges for Lance Ong (Petitioner/Respondent). Monica Del'Osso for Mark Ong and Tyi Ong (Trustees/Petitioners/Respondents).

The Court inquired as to whether the Buddha statue had been appraised; counsel concurred that it had not been appraised. The Court stated that it wanted the statue appraised. Mr. Sturges stated that Lance Ong was in possession of the statue, and that he believed photos of the statue could be used to perform the appraisal. Ms. Del' Osso stated that she didn't think photographs would work, and she would talk with counsel. Counsel presented argument to support their positions as to the distribution of $15,000 in funds to Lance Ong and the issue regarding transfer of property to the estate. Both petitions were taken under submission. In addition, the Court set a status hearing on December 29, 2008 regarding discovery, any resolution, and/or the setting of an evidentiary hearing. The Court informed Mr. Sturges that his client, Lance Ong, would need to appear at the status hearing.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda/S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy: Aguerre.
